


- [**Chapter 2**: Frequency Distributions and Graphs](https://yyliou.github.io/stat/ch2/ch2.html)

- [**Chapter 3**: Data Description](https://yyliou.github.io/stat/ch3/ch3.html)

- [**Chapter 4**: Probability and Counting Rules](https://yyliou.github.io/stat/ch4/ch4.html)

- [**Chapter 5**: Discrete Probability Distributions](https://yyliou.github.io/stat/ch5/ch5.html)
